class.name: PlayFabPartyChatControl
class.brief_description: Diagnostic wrapper around a PlayFab Party chat control.
class.description: Provides advanced access to a PlayFab Party chat control. Most title code should prefer the entity-key helpers on [PlayFabPartyChat] (such as [method PlayFabPartyChat.send_text_async] and [method PlayFabPartyChat.set_chat_permissions_async]) which do not require maintaining chat-control identity.

method.name: get_user
method.description: Returns the [PlayFabUser] bound to the chat control, if local.

method.name: is_voice_enabled
method.description: Returns whether voice chat is enabled on the control.

method.name: is_text_enabled
method.description: Returns whether text chat is enabled on the control.

method.name: is_transcription_enabled
method.description: Returns whether transcription is enabled on the control.

method.name: is_local
method.description: Returns whether the chat control is local.

method.name: send_text_async
method.description: Sends [param message] to the listed target chat controls.

method.name: set_permissions_async
method.description: Updates the local chat-control relationship permissions for [param target]. See [enum PlayFabParty.ChatPermission].

method.name: set_audio_muted_async
method.description: Mutes or unmutes incoming [b]voice audio[/b] from [param target] on the local chat control. Independent of [method set_text_muted_async].

method.name: set_text_muted_async
method.description: Mutes or unmutes incoming [b]text chat[/b] from [param target] on the local chat control. Independent of [method set_audio_muted_async].

method.name: destroy_async
method.description: Destroys the chat control. The owning network may recreate it on demand.

members.member: Local [PlayFabUser] bound to the chat control.
Whether the chat control is local.

signal.name: message_received
signal.description: Emitted when a text chat message is received on this control.

signal.name: transcription_received
signal.description: Emitted when a transcription is received on this control.
